choose.when: SELECT HOUR(inporttime) AS label, IFNULL(SUM(inportprice * number), 0) AS total FROM bus_inport WHERE DATE(inporttime) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(inporttime) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY HOUR(inporttime) ORDER BY label

SELECT DAYOFWEEK(inporttime) - 1 AS label, IFNULL(SUM(inportprice * number), 0) AS total FROM bus_inport WHERE DATE(inporttime) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(inporttime) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY DAYOFWEEK(inporttime) - 1 ORDER BY label

SELECT DAY(inporttime) AS label, IFNULL(SUM(inportprice * number), 0) AS total FROM bus_inport WHERE DATE(inporttime) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(inporttime) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY DAY(inporttime) ORDER BY label

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(inporttime, '%Y%m%d') AS label, IFNULL(SUM(inportprice * number), 0) AS total FROM bus_inport WHERE DATE(inporttime) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(inporttime) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(inporttime) ORDER BY label

SELECT MONTH(inporttime) AS label, IFNULL(SUM(inportprice * number), 0) AS total FROM bus_inport WHERE DATE(inporttime) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(inporttime) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY MONTH(inporttime) ORDER BY label

SELECT HOUR(inporttime) AS label, IFNULL(SUM(inportprice * number), 0) AS total FROM bus_inport WHERE DATE(inporttime) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(inporttime) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY HOUR(inporttime) ORDER BY label

SELECT DAYOFWEEK(inporttime) - 1 AS label, IFNULL(SUM(inportprice * number), 0) AS total FROM bus_inport WHERE DATE(inporttime) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(inporttime) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY DAYOFWEEK(inporttime) - 1 ORDER BY label

SELECT DAY(inporttime) AS label, IFNULL(SUM(inportprice * number), 0) AS total FROM bus_inport WHERE DATE(inporttime) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(inporttime) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY DAY(inporttime) ORDER BY label

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(inporttime, '%Y%m%d') AS label, IFNULL(SUM(inportprice * number), 0) AS total FROM bus_inport WHERE DATE(inporttime) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(inporttime) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(inporttime) ORDER BY label

SELECT MONTH(inporttime) AS label, IFNULL(SUM(inportprice * number), 0) AS total FROM bus_inport WHERE DATE(inporttime) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(inporttime) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY MONTH(inporttime) ORDER BY label
